-= Kitchenette =-
You are in a kitchenette. A normal one.

You make out a board. The board appears to be empty. This always happens!

There is an open gateway leading east. There is an exit to the south. Don't worry, it is unguarded.

-= Study =-

There is a backup calendar on the floor.
